hero.title: Hey, I'm @zx10r.
hero.intro: I'm a junior penetration tester and web developer specializing in identifying vulnerabilities and building secure web applications.

badges.label: Hack The Box badge
badges.alt: Hack The Box badge for zx10r

items.label: TryHackMe Ranking
items.note: Ranked in the top 1% globally on TryHackMe and listed 44th in Malaysia.

items.label: TryHackMe Rooms
items.note: Completed over 350 rooms covering penetration testing, web exploitation, and network exploitation.

items.label: Bingo CTF 2025
items.note: Placed 3rd with a 3-member team across web exploitation, cryptography, and forensics challenges.

items.label: MCMC Finalist
items.note: Finalist in the MCMC Intervarsity Cyber Forensics Challenge 2025 under time-constrained incident analysis.

items.label: Challenges Delivered
items.note: Delivered 9 web challenges and 1 Boot2Root machine across CTF events.

items.label: Technical Talks
items.note: Delivered two web exploitation sessions for DIV:IDE Academy and Hack@10 CTF preparation.

items.label: Certificates Earned
items.note: Including CEHv13, CCNA Intro to Networks, Junior Penetration Tester, and web development training.

items.label: Current GPA
items.note: Bachelor of Computer Science (Cybersecurity) student at Universiti Tenaga Nasional.

blogPreview.heading: Writeups / Blog
blogPreview.intro: Technical writeups covering CTF solves, lab work, exploitation paths, and security lessons pulled from hands-on practice.

items.title: B2R Monster Corporate Writeup
items.text: A boot-to-root writeup for Monster Corporate, covering SMB enumeration, WordPress admin access, plugin RCE, lateral movement with xxd, and cron-based privilege escalation.

items.title: Active Directory Lab Notes: Enumeration, Trust Paths, and Privilege Escalation
items.text: Notes from building and attacking an Active Directory lab, focused on domain enumeration, trust paths, and escalation patterns.

items.title: A Practical Web Exploitation Workflow for CTFs and Labs
items.text: A disciplined web testing workflow for mapping application behavior, finding logic flaws, and proving impact cleanly.

seo.title: Aiman Sam | Junior Pentester and Web Developer
seo.description: Aiman Sam is a junior penetration tester and web developer focused on web exploitation, offensive security labs, and building secure web applications.
seo.jobTitle: Junior Penetration Tester and Web Developer
